what_so_what.what: You worked on '{title}'. Can you tell me what you did?
what_so_what.so_what: That's interesting! Why do you think that matters?
what_so_what.now_what: Great thinking! What would you like to try next time?

kolb.concrete_experience: You just finished working on '{title}'. What did you actually do during this session?
kolb.reflective_observation: Looking back at your work on '{title}', what did you notice or observe?
kolb.abstract_conceptualization: What patterns or ideas did you discover while working on '{title}'?
kolb.active_experimentation: Based on what you learned, what would you like to experiment with next?

gibbs.description: Can you describe what happened while you were working on '{title}'?
gibbs.feelings: How did you feel while working on '{title}'? Were there moments of frustration or excitement?
gibbs.evaluation: What went well during your work on '{title}'? What didn't go as planned?
gibbs.analysis: Why do you think things happened the way they did?
gibbs.conclusion: What have you learned from this experience?
gibbs.action_plan: If you were to do this again, what would you do differently?
